attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
'SERVICES' AS CATEGORY,
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA') AS IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
'N' AS CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SREP.SALES_REP_NUM AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA') AS IS_SALES_REP_NUM , 
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA') AS IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,            
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
PRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID,
BILLTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS BILLTO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_NAME,
SOLDTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(SHIPTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS' THEN CAST((CAST(BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)) AS VARCHAR(50)) WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='XAAS' THEN COALESCE(XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') ELSE CAST((CAST(BKGS.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT)) AS VARCHAR(50)) END AS SO_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE((CASE WHEN DSV_FLG='Y' THEN DSV_REASON.RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUM ELSE BKGS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM END),'-') AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
COALESCE(DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUM,'-') AS DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER,
TRIM(BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID) AS DEAL_ID,
PRD.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD AS SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
PRD.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
PRD.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
FIN_HIER.SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AS SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
FIN_HIER.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID AS ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
FIN_HIER.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE AS SALES_ADJ_CD,
CAST (BKGS.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS' AND BKGS.DSV_FLG='Y' THEN 'DSV' ELSE BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE END AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG AS FMV_FLG,
DSV_REASON.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_DESCR,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END )),0) AS TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,
--COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN  ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' AND  BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END)),0) AS TSS_BGM_NET_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN  ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' AND  BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND FIN_HIER.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <> 'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES' THEN (DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END)),0) AS TSS_BGM_NET_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' AND  BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  AND FIN_HIER.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <> 'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES' THEN (BKGS.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END)),0)  AS TSS_BGM_COST_AMT,
0 AS TSS_BGM_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' AND  BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND FIN_HIER.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <> 'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES' THEN (BKGS.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END)),0) AS TSS_TTL_BGM_AMT,
BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
OFFER_TYPE.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS DV_RO_CISCO_ONE_FLG,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND RO_LOOKUP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_XCAT_PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND RO_LOOKUP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_XCAT_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.XCAT_FLG='Y' AND RO_LOOKUP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_XCAT_TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_RO_PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_RO_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_ELA_PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_ELA_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG='Y' THEN (DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END  ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_ELA_TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,
'UNKNOWN' AS WEB_ORDER_ID,
COALESCE(DSV_LINE_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DSV_LINE_STATUS_CD,
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_IS_FLG,
/* Addition of 2 New columns as part of Feb 7th Release*/
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRODUCT_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRODUCT_MY_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SERVICE_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SERVICE_MY_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END),0) AS DV_TOTAL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END),0) AS DV_TOTAL_MY_BKGS_AMT,
/*ACQ Chagnes */
CASE WHEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD LIKE 'ACQ-%' THEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  AND BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_PRD_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  AND BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_PRD_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  AND BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_SVC_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  AND BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_SVC_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_TTL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT *CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_TTL_MY_BKGS_AMT,


COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_PRD_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_PRD_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN (DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END ) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_SVC_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN (DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT *CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_SVC_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END),0) AS DV_SW_TTL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*CASE WHEN FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE FIN_HIER.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END),0) AS DV_SW_TTL_MY_BKGS_AMT,
--RO_LOOKUP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
COALESCE((CASE WHEN BKGS.SALES_MOTION_CD='N/A' THEN 'NEW' ELSE BKGS.SALES_MOTION_CD END),'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_MOTION_CD,

SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
CONTRACT_DURATION,
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT,      
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT ,     
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT  ,    
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT,  
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT  , 
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT  ,
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT   ,
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT  ,
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT 

FROM
(
SELECT 
INNER_BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
INNER_BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
INNER_BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
INNER_BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
INNER_BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
INNER_BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
INNER_BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
INNER_BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
INNER_BKGS.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
INNER_BKGS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
INNER_BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID,
INNER_BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
INNER_BKGS.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
INNER_BKGS.DSV_FLG,
INNER_BKGS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
INNER_BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
COALESCE(RO.RO_FLG,'N') AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, -- FY-20 RO LOGIC
CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
			WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
			
CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  
			WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
			
CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
			
CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
			WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,

INNER_BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
INNER_BKGS.XCAT_FLG,

CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,

CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(INNER_BKGS.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,


(CASE WHEN INNER_BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y' THEN  SQ.SALES_MOTION_CD ELSE RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD END)  AS SALES_MOTION_CD,

INNER_BKGS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
INNER_BKGS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
INNER_BKGS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION AS CONTRACT_DURATION,
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT,      
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT ,     
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT  ,    
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT,  
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT  , 
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT  ,
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT   ,
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT  ,
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT 

FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE INNER_BKGS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y 
ON INNER_BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 1

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_SUMMARY_QUOTE_BKGS_MSR SQ
ON INNER_BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = SQ.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND INNER_BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = SQ.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT 
AND INNER_BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = SQ.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND INNER_BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND INNER_BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SQ.SALES_REP_NUM 

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION RTN 
ON RTN.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY =INNER_BKGS.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY 
AND RTN.END_TV_DT > CURRENT_DATE

/* FY-20 RO LOGIC START */
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.RO_MBR_SVC_SPLITPCT RO
ON INNER_BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =RO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
AND INNER_BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=RO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND INNER_BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=RO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
AND INNER_BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
AND INNER_BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=RO.SALES_REP_NUMBER
/* FY-20 RO LOGIC END */

WHERE INNER_BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG = 'N'
AND INNER_BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y' 
AND INNER_BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
RSTD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_START_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
RSTD.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
RSTD.PRODUCT_KEY,
RSTD.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
RSTD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RSTD.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RSTD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RSTD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RSTD.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
RSTD.SERVICE_FLG,
RSTD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
RSTD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
RSTD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
RSTD.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
RSTD.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
RSTD.DV_DEAL_ID,
RSTD.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
RSTD.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
RSTD.DSV_FLG,
RSTD.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
RSTD.DV_FMV_FLG,
COALESCE(RO.RO_FLG,'N') AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, -- FY-20 RO LOGIC
0 AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
0 AS DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
0 AS DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
0 AS DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
RSTD.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
RSTD.XCAT_FLG,
CASE WHEN RSTD.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(BKGS_MSR.DV_ANNUAL_NET_AMT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			WHEN RSTD.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(BKGS_MSR.DV_ANNUAL_NET_AMT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_ANNUAL_NET_AMT,

CASE WHEN RSTD.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(BKGS_MSR.DV_MY_NET_PCT,0) * COALESCE(SQ.DV_SMC_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			WHEN RSTD.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'N'  THEN CAST(COALESCE(BKGS_MSR.DV_MY_NET_PCT,0) * COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1) * COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			ELSE 0 END AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,


(CASE WHEN RSTD.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG = 'Y' THEN  SQ.SALES_MOTION_CD ELSE RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD END)  AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
RSTD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
RSTD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
RSTD.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION AS CONTRACT_DURATION,
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT,      
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT ,     
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT  ,    
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT,  
0.0 AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT  , 
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT  ,
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT   ,
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT  ,
0.0 AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT 

FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PRODUCT_HWSW_ANNUITY BKGS_MSR 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE RSTD 
 ON   RSTD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RSTD.SALES_REP_NUMBER=BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUM
AND RSTD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND RSTD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND RSTD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR FD2Y 
 ON BKGS_MSR.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT = FD2Y.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT 
 
 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_SUMMARY_QUOTE_BKGS_MSR SQ
ON RSTD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = SQ.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND RSTD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = SQ.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT 
AND RSTD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = SQ.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND RSTD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RSTD.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SQ.SALES_REP_NUM 

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION RTN 
ON RTN.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY =RSTD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY 
AND RTN.END_TV_DT > CURRENT_DATE

/* FY-20 RO LOGIC START */
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.RO_MBR_SVC_SPLITPCT RO
ON RSTD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =RO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
AND RSTD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=RO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND RSTD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=RO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
AND RSTD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
AND RSTD.SALES_REP_NUMBER=RO.SALES_REP_NUMBER
/* FY-20 RO LOGIC END */ 
 
 WHERE BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG = 'Y' 
 AND BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'
 AND BKGS_MSR.TRUE_UP_FLG='Y'  AND BOOKING_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('ANN')
 AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 1 
)  BKGS 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y 
ON BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP
ON RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE  OFFER_TYPE
ON OFFER_TYPE.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME=RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN SHIER 
ON BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE 
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP 
ON BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD 
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
--INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.R_TRX_PRODUCT TRX 
--ON TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO BILLTO 
ON BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=BILLTO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST END_CUST 
ON BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO SOLDTO 
ON BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SOLDTO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SHIPTO SHIPTO 
ON BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=SHIPTO.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 

INNER JOIN 
(

SELECT 
ALLOC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AS SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID, 
ALLOC.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID AS ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
ALLOC.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION, 
ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ,
ALLOC.ITEM_KEY,    
SUM(ALLOC.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE)  AS ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE        
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC ALLOC 
WHERE DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD='SPA'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
)  FIN_HIER
/* ON FIN_HIER.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID = PRD.DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID */
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY  = FIN_HIER.ITEM_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX  XAAS
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=BKGS.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DSV_CHANGE_DETAIL_DAILY DSV_REASON
ON DSV_REASON.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRCT_ST_INSIDE_SLS_ASGMT_LNK ALH
ON BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND ALH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT IN (SELECT PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE WHERE PDATE.DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER = ALH.BK_DR_SLS_TER_ASMT_SLS_REP_NUM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  IS_SHIER
ON IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.INSIDE_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND  IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP  IS_SREP
ON ALH.BK_INSIDE_SALES_REP_NUM = IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
WHERE BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
AND BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
AND FIN_HIER.SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID NOT IN ('UNKNOWN','WORLDWIDE TRAINING')
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT IN
( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
and 1=2
GROUP BY 
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA'),   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QTR_AGE,
SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA'),  
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
PRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID,
CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS' THEN CAST((CAST(BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)) AS VARCHAR(50)) WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='XAAS' THEN COALESCE(XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') ELSE CAST((CAST(BKGS.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT)) AS VARCHAR(50)) END,
COALESCE((CASE WHEN DSV_FLG='Y' THEN DSV_REASON.RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUM ELSE BKGS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM END),'-'),
COALESCE(DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUM,'-'),
TRIM(BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID),
PRD.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
PRD.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
PRD.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
FIN_HIER.SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
FIN_HIER.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
FIN_HIER.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
CAST (BKGS.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS' AND BKGS.DSV_FLG='Y' THEN 'DSV' ELSE BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE END,
BKGS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
DSV_REASON.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_DESCR,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
OFFER_TYPE.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
COALESCE(DSV_LINE_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN'),
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END,
/* Addition of 2 New columns as part of Feb 7th Release*/
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/*ACQ Chagnes */
CASE WHEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD LIKE 'ACQ-%' THEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END,
BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BILLTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,
END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,
SOLDTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(SHIPTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_MOTION_CD,
BKGS.SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
BKGS.SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
BKGS.CONTRACT_DURATION

SELECT
'PRODUCT' AS CATEGORY,
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA') AS IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
'N'  AS CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SREP.SALES_REP_NUM AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA') AS IS_SALES_REP_NUM , 
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA') AS IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,            
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
PRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID,
BILLTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS BILLTO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_NAME,
SOLDTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(SHIPTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS' THEN CAST((CAST(BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS BIGINT)) AS VARCHAR(50)) WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='XAAS' THEN COALESCE(XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') ELSE CAST((CAST(BKGS.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT)) AS VARCHAR(50)) END AS SO_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE((CASE WHEN DSV_FLG='Y' THEN DSV_REASON.RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUM ELSE BKGS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM END),'-') AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
COALESCE(DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUM,'-') AS DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER,
TRIM(BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID) AS DEAL_ID,
PRD.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD AS SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
PRD.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
PRD.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE AS SALES_ADJ_CD,
CAST (BKGS.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS' AND BKGS.DSV_FLG='Y' THEN 'DSV' ELSE BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE END AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG AS FMV_FLG,
DSV_REASON.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_DESCR,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))),0) AS TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN (BGM.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FACTOR_PCT IS NULL OR BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE LIKE '%LCLD%' ) THEN 0 ELSE CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7))  END)),0) AS PRD_BGM_NET_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN (BGM.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FACTOR_PCT IS NULL OR BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE LIKE '%LCLD%' ) THEN 0 ELSE CAST((DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7))  END)),0) AS PRD_BGM_COST_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN (BGM.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FACTOR_PCT IS NULL OR BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE LIKE '%LCLD%' )  THEN 0 ELSE CAST(COALESCE((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)),0)AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END*COALESCE(BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FACTOR_PCT,0))),0) AS PRD_BGM_AMT,
COALESCE((PRD_BGM_NET_AMT - PRD_BGM_COST_AMT - PRD_BGM_AMT),0) AS TTL_PRD_BGM_AMT,
BILLTO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SOLDTO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE(SHIPTO.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
OFFER_TYPE.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS DV_RO_CISCO_ONE_FLG,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND RO_LOOKUP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE *COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_XCAT_PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND RO_LOOKUP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE *COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_XCAT_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.XCAT_FLG='Y' AND RO_LOOKUP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_XCAT_TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_RO_PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_RO_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_ELA_PRODUCT_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' AND RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE *COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) DV_ELA_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_ELA_TOTAL_BKGS_AMT,
'UNKNOWN' AS WEB_ORDER_ID,
COALESCE(DSV_LINE_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DSV_LINE_STATUS_CD,
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_IS_FLG,
/* Addition of 2 New columns as part of Feb 7th Release*/
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRODUCT_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRODUCT_MY_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SERVICE_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SERVICE_MY_BKGS_AMT,

COALESCE(SUM(CAST(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))),0) AS DV_TOTAL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CAST(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)AS DECIMAL(26,7))),0) AS DV_TOTAL_MY_BKGS_AMT,

/* ACQ Changes */
CASE WHEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD LIKE 'ACQ-%' THEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  AND RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_PRD_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  AND RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_PRD_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  AND RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_SVC_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  AND RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_SVC_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_TTL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RO.RO_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_RO_TTL_MY_BKGS_AMT,


COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_PRD_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'  THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE *COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_PRD_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE *COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_SVC_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y'  THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE *COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_SW_SVC_MY_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CAST(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))),0) AS DV_SW_TTL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CAST(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(26,7))),0) AS DV_SW_TTL_MY_BKGS_AMT,
RO.RO_FLG  AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,

RTMS.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
CAST(CAST('1900/01/01' AS DATE) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
CAST(CAST('1900/01/01' AS DATE) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
0.0 AS CONTRACT_DURATION,

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND PRD.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT,
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN PRD.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND PRD.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N' AND PRD.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_PRD_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT,
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT,  
0.0 AS DV_SVC_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT,   
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN PRD.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_ANN_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN PRD.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN CAST((DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1))AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0 END),0) AS DV_TTL_ENRICHED_SAAS_MY_AMT

FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y 
ON BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE 
AND BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG = 'N'
AND BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP
ON RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE  OFFER_TYPE
ON OFFER_TYPE.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME=RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN SHIER 
ON BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE' 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE 
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP 
ON BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD 
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
--INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_TRX_PRODUCT TRX 
--ON TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY 


INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_TMS_SLS_ALOC_PRD_ALOC COMP
ON COMP.ITEM_KEY =CASE WHEN BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY END 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT RTMS
ON RTMS.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY = COMP.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY
AND RTMS.HIERARCHY_TYPE='TMS_ALLOCATED_SALES'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO BILLTO 
ON BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=BILLTO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST END_CUST 
ON BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO SOLDTO 
ON BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SOLDTO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SHIPTO SHIPTO 
ON BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=SHIPTO.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FACTOR BGM
ON SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR=BGM.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME=BGM.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
AND BKGS.SERVICE_FLG=BGM.SERVICE_FLG
AND BGM.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'	
AND BGM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT=FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX  XAAS
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=BKGS.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DSV_CHANGE_DETAIL_DAILY DSV_REASON
ON DSV_REASON.POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRCT_ST_INSIDE_SLS_ASGMT_LNK ALH
ON BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND ALH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT IN (SELECT PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE WHERE PDATE.DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER = ALH.BK_DR_SLS_TER_ASMT_SLS_REP_NUM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  IS_SHIER
ON IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.INSIDE_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND  IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP  IS_SREP
ON ALH.BK_INSIDE_SALES_REP_NUM = IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
/* FY-20 RO LOGIC START */
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.RO_MBR_PRD_SPLITPCT RO
ON BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =RO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
AND BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=RO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=RO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
AND BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
AND BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=RO.SALES_REP_NUMBER
/* FY-20 RO LOGIC END */  
WHERE BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT IN
( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
GROUP BY 
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA'),   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),  
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA'),  
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
PRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID,
BILLTO.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,
END_CUST.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,
